sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_timezones ( event_time DateTime, event_name String );
INSERT INTO test_timezones (event_time, event_name) VALUES (toDateTime('2023-10-01 12:00:00', 'UTC'), 'Test Event');
UPDATE test_timezones SET event_time = toTimeZone(event_time, 'Europe/London') WHERE event_name = 'Test Event';
SELECT event_name, toTimeZone(event_time, 'Asia/Tokyo') AS tokyo_time FROM test_timezones;
SELECT event_name, toTypeName(toTimeZone(event_time, 'America/New_York')) AS new_york_type FROM test_timezones;
